name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ \E j \in 1..N :
            /\ state[j] = "critical"
            /\ turn' = (turn % N) + 1
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
           /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
  /\ votes \in [1..N -> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]
  /\ messages \in Seq([sender -> 0..N)

Init ==
  /\ state = "Init"
  /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> "Pending"]
  /\ messages = <<>>

Prepare ==
  /\ state = "Init"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> 0, receiver -> 1..N, type -> "Prepare"])
  /\ state' = "Prepared"
  /\ votes' = votes
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

VoteYes ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "Pending"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "Yes"]
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> i, receiver -> 0, type -> "VoteYes"])
  /\ state' = state
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

VoteNo ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "Pending"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "No"]
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> i, receiver -> 0, type -> "VoteNo"])
  /\ state' = state
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Commit ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "Yes"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> 0, receiver -> 1..N, type -> "Commit"])
  /\ state' = "Committed"
  /\ votes' = votes
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Abort ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "No"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> 0, receiver -> 1..N, type -> "Abort"])
  /\ state' = "Aborted"
  /\ votes' = votes
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i

TakeForks(i) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : (Hungry(i) /\ CanEat(i)) => TakeForks(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "eating" => PutForks(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
         /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue *)
Enqueue == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* placeholder value *)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Enqueue \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E term \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = term
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
